output.dependency: One column encodes an itinerary/flight identifier including an origin/destination pair and implicitly ties to a schedule date-time pattern in another column (the time of departure shown with a day and month), so the departure timestamp values are determined by the encoded route.

The encoded itinerary/flight identifier in one column (origin/destination route) determines the schedule date-time shown in another column (the time of check-in/early event with day/month), so the check-in/earlier timestamp is route-dependent.

The encoded itinerary/flight identifier implies the arrival/scheduled local time pattern in another column (time formatted with meridiem). Arrival time is therefore dependent on the route encoded in the identifier.

The same itinerary/route identifier determines the alternate/actual/updated arrival time column (also a meridiem time), so the later timestamp value is constrained by the flight/routing represented in the identifier.
